mapper.select:
select provider_id, provider_name, provider_type, api_url, api_key, model, priority, is_enabled, create_at, update_at from ai_provider where 1=1
and provider_name like concat('%', #{providerName}, '%')
order by priority asc
select provider_id, provider_name, provider_type, api_url, api_key, model, priority, is_enabled, create_at, update_at from ai_provider where provider_id = #{providerId}
select provider_id, provider_name, provider_type, api_url, api_key, model, priority, is_enabled, create_at, update_at from ai_provider where is_enabled = 1 order by priority asc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into ai_provider (provider_name, provider_type, api_url, api_key, model, priority, is_enabled, create_at) values (#{providerName}, #{providerType}, #{apiUrl}, #{apiKey}, #{model}, #{priority}, #{isEnabled}, #{createAt})
